title: Product preview card
text: I opted to just change the layout from vertical to horizontal using a media query, not sure if there's a clever way to
fullText: I am proud of the amount of work I believe to have put into this project. It was one that required me to learn about JavaScript and the use of it in HTML and CSS.
I had coding issues with the error and success messages that would be popped dynamically by JavaScript. On this, I had to learn, watch videos on YouTube on how to arrive with the solution.
Concerning the width and height of the project or the sizing, yeah i believe I would need extra help for precision on it.

title: Rest countries
text: I really need to work on my ts skills.
fullText: Using React to create a FEM project.
Initially it was difficult to think about state and how that would affect the UI as I am used to manipulating the DOM directly to see changes. After some practice it became more intuitive.

If you click on 'Add to Cart', the selected product's image will show a red border around it to indicate selection. If you zoom in close you will notice that there is a slight gap between the border and the image.

title: Responsive page using css
fullText: Using React to create a FEM project.
Initially it was difficult to think about state and how that would affect the UI as I am used to manipulating the DOM directly to see changes. After some practice it became more intuitive.

If you click on 'Add to Cart', the selected product's image will show a red border around it to indicate selection. If you zoom in close you will notice that there is a slight gap between the border and the image.
